title: sideritis occidentalis
intro: Sideritis occidentalis, also known as Western Ironwort or Western Mountain Tea, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Sideritis occidentalis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Sideritis occidentalis can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent such as ethanol, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
